name: News — Hacker News Front Page
description: Top headline from Hacker News via the Algolia HN search API. The public `/api/v1/search?tags=front_page` endpoint needs no secret (rate-limited per IP, plenty for a slow-refresh e-ink tile). The http source projects the first hit's `title` / `url` / `points` and — for the 4x4 list layout — the title of every front-page hit. 1x2 stacks the headline above the points count; 2x2 mirrors 1x2 with a slightly larger headline; 4x4 shows the top headline plus the next several as a `list`.
